message:
test(conformance): expand round 6 — scripting, geo, acl, connection, copy (2603 cases)

New test cases: Lua string/table ops, pcall, SCRIPT EXISTS multi-SHA,
GEOSEARCH ASC/DESC/COUNT/BYBOX, GEOADD CH, ACL case sensitivity,
SETUSER/DELUSER, GENPASS errors, PING message, RESET, SELECT edges,
COPY type verification, REPLACE across types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
